text: Bob: I'll investigate the Postgres outage by Friday.
Alice: I'll send the pricing deck to legal by end of day.

labels.name: send the pricing deck to legal

text:
Alice: we should probably think about the pricing review at some point.
Bob: yeah, maybe next quarter?
Team agreed to ship the v2 migration on May 22 after the security review.

labels.name: ship the v2 migration on May 22

text: We're blocked on the API contract from vendor Acme — can't ship until they reply.
